view.aba.h1.title: // AGE-BASED ALLOCATION
view.aba.hint.intro: A simple heuristic for how much to hold in stocks: equity % = N โ age. The classic N is 100; longer lifespans pushed it to 110 or 120 for more growth. Bonds take the rest, and the equity share falls as you age โ a built-in glidepath toward capital preservation. A rule of thumb, not advice. Updates as you type.

view.breakeven.h1.title: // BREAK-EVEN ANALYSIS
view.breakeven.hint.intro: The most basic small-business question: how many units must you sell to cover your costs? Each unit contributes price โ variable cost toward the fixed costs (its contribution margin); break-even is where that accumulated contribution exactly covers them. Add a target profit to see the volume that earns it, and your expected sales to see the margin of safety. If the contribution margin is zero or negative, no volume ever breaks even โ selling more only loses more.
view.breakeven.warn.no_be: Price is at or below variable cost โ every unit loses money before fixed costs. Raise price or cut variable cost.

view.brrrr.h1.title: // BRRRR
view.brrrr.hint.intro: Buy a distressed property cheap, rehab it to force appreciation, rent it, then refinance against the higher after-repair value and pull your cash back out to do it again. The deal succeeds when the cash-out refi recovers everything you put in โ the cash left in the deal still earns rent, so the cash-on-cash return goes infinite.
view.brrrr.note.partial: Some cash stays in the deal; the cash-on-cash return measures what it earns.
view.brrrr.note.recovered: The refinance recovered all your cash โ an infinite-return rental you can repeat.

view.burn.h1.title: // BURN RATE & RUNWAY
view.burn.hint.intro: How long the cash lasts. Gross burn is monthly expenses; net burn is expenses minus revenue โ what actually drains the bank. Runway is the months of cash at that burn, simulated month by month so growing revenue extends it. If revenue overtakes expenses before the cash runs out, you reach break-even and never deplete. Updates as you type.

view.capgains.h1.title: // CAPITAL GAINS TAX
view.capgains.hint.intro: Federal tax on a sale. Long-term gains use the preferential 0% / 15% / 20% brackets, stacked on top of your ordinary taxable income so the gain is taxed in slices as it crosses each 2026 threshold. Short-term gains are ordinary income at the rate you enter. Updates as you type.
view.capture.h1.title: // UP / DOWN CAPTURE RATIO
view.capture.hint.intro: Split periods by the benchmark's sign, geometrically compound each side, and compare. Up capture above 100 means the strategy beats the benchmark in rising markets; down capture below 100 means it loses less when the benchmark falls. A capture ratio above 1 is the favorable asymmetry. Enter paired period returns in percent. Updates as you type.

view.caraff.h1.title: // CAR AFFORDABILITY
view.caraff.hint.intro: The 20/4/10 rule of thumb - put 20% down, finance for no more than 4 years, and keep total vehicle spending under 10% of gross income. This works back from the income cap to the most car you can afford. Updates as you type.

view.cbwash.h1.title: // CROSS-BROKER WASH SALES
view.cbwash.hint.intro: Pesumyyntiรค koskevia sรครคntรถjรค sovelletaan TAXPAYER-tasolla eikรค tilin tasolla. Myydรครคn IBKR:ssรค + ostetaan Webullissa ยฑ30 pรคivรคn kuluessa = pesumyynti. Kumpikaan vรคlittรคjรคn 1099-B saalista tรคmรค sinun on itse raportin. Sama koskee myรถs puolisoiden ja vakuutuslaitosten vรคlisiรค suhteita. Log kaikki myy + ostaa tรครคllรค, automaattinen tunnistus. TTS + ยง 475(f) MTM poistaa sinut kokonaan pesu-myynti sรครคnnรถistรค.

view.ccc.h1.title: // CASH CONVERSION CYCLE
view.ccc.hint.intro: How many days a dollar is tied up in operations. DSO is how long customers take to pay (receivables รท revenue ร period); DIO is how long inventory sits (inventory รท COGS ร period); DPO is how long you take to pay suppliers (payables รท COGS ร period). CCC = DSO + DIO โ DPO. A negative cycle is excellent โ you collect before you pay, so growth funds itself. Updates as you type.
view.ccc.note.self: Negative cycle โ suppliers finance your operations; growth is self-funding.
view.ccpayoff.h1.title: // CREDIT CARD PAYOFF
view.ccpayoff.hint.intro: The minimum-payment trap. The minimum due is the greater of a floor and a percent of the balance, so it shrinks as you pay down - most of each payment goes to interest, stretching a small balance into decades. Compare it to a fixed monthly payment. Updates as you type.
view.cd.h1.title: // CEASE AND DESIST LETTER
view.cd.hint.intro: A formal demand that the recipient stop a specified conduct (harassment, IP infringement, defamation, breach). Unlike a demand for payment, the remedy sought is stopping an action. It computes the comply-by date from the service date plus the response window. Drafting aid, not legal advice.
view.cd_ladder.intro: Jaa kertasumma tasan N-CD-levyille, jotka kukin erรครคntyy vuoden vรคlein. Kun jokainen soitto kypsyy, pyรถritรค tulos uudelle N-vuoden CD:lle tikkaiden ylรคosassa. Vuosittainen likviditeetti + korkeampi pitkรคn aikavรคlin CD-korko suurimmassa osassa rahaa. Ilmoitettava korko/juoksuaika + sekoitettu korko.

view.cdp.h1.title: // CD EARLY WITHDRAWAL
view.cdp.hint.intro: Cashing out a CD before maturity triggers a penalty โ usually a set number of months of interest. If you haven't held it long enough to earn that much, the penalty eats into principal. This shows the interest earned, the penalty, the net proceeds, the annualized yield you actually got, and whether you'd lose principal. Updates as you type.

view.coast_fire.title: // COAST FIRE
view.coh.h1.title: // TRUE COST OF HIRE
view.coh.hint.intro: A salary is only part of what an employee costs. Fully loaded adds the employer's payroll taxes, benefits, retirement match, workers' comp, and overhead โ commonly 1.25รโ1.4ร base. A 1099 contractor bills a higher rate but covers their own taxes, benefits, and gear, so their cost is just the contract spend. This compares total annual cost and effective hourly (the employee's PTO cuts productive hours, raising their true hourly). Updates as you type.

view.debt_avalanche.intro: Pay minimums on every debt; route all extra payment to the highest-APR debt โ mathematically optimal for total interest minimisation. When a debt clears, roll its minimum onto the next-highest-APR debt (snowball effect applied to avalanche ordering).

view.debt_snowball.intro: Dave Ramseyn kรคyttรคytymisstrategia: maksa minimit jokaisesta velasta; reititรค kaikki ylimรครคrรคistรค pieneen tasapainoon APR. Kun velka hรคlvenee, pyรถritรค sen mini seuraavaksi pienimpรครคn. Varhainen voittaa polttoaineen noudattamisen. Puhdas math nรคkรถala sanoo lumivyรถry on optimaalinen ... mutta Northwesternin Gal & McShane 2012 -tutkimuksen mukaan lumipallon kรคyttรคjรคt ovat valmiita useammin.

view.divc.h1.title: // DIVIDEND COVERAGE
view.divc.hint.intro: Is a stock's dividend sustainable? The payout ratio (dividends รท EPS) is the share of earnings paid out โ over 100% means the dividend exceeds earnings, funded from cash or debt. Coverage (EPS รท DPS) is how many times earnings cover it; retention is what's plowed back. The FCF payout (dividends รท free cash flow) is a stricter test, since dividends are paid from cash, not accounting earnings. Updates as you type.

view.dr.h1.title: // DEPRECIATION RECAPTURE
view.dr.hint.intro: Depreciation lowers a rental's basis while you hold it; selling claws part of that back. For real property, the depreciation portion of the gain is unrecaptured ยง 1250 gain, taxed at a maximum 25% rate; the appreciation above your original basis is regular long-term capital gain. Recapture is limited to the lesser of depreciation taken or the total gain โ a sale at a loss recaptures nothing. NIIT (3.8%) may apply on top. Updates as you type.
view.dr.loss: Sale is at a loss โ no gain and no depreciation recapture.

view.dscr.h1.title: // DSCR
view.dscr.hint.intro: The debt-service coverage ratio is how rental and commercial lenders size a loan: net operating income divided by annual debt service. At or above the lender's minimum (commonly 1.20-1.25) the income covers the payments with a cushion. This also sizes the largest loan that still clears your target DSCR. Updates as you type.

view.dupont.h1.title: // DUPONT ROE
view.dupont.hint.intro: Decomposes return on equity into the levers that drive it: tax burden x interest burden x operating margin x asset turnover x equity multiplier. The first three collapse to net profit margin, so the picture is margin x turnover x leverage - showing whether ROE comes from profitability, efficiency, or debt. Updates as you type.
view.dy.h1.title: // DEBT YIELD & LOAN SIZING
view.dy.hint.intro: A commercial lender sizes a loan against three ceilings, and the smallest wins: debt yield (NOI รท loan, a rate-independent risk measure, floored at ~8โ10%), LTV (loan รท value), and LTC (loan รท total cost). This shows each ratio for your proposed loan, the max loan each ceiling allows, and which one binds. Complements cap rate and DSCR. Updates as you type.
view.eac.h1.title: // EQUIVALENT ANNUAL COST
view.eac.hint.intro: EAC is the level yearly cost with the same present value as buying and running an asset over its life โ the right way to compare assets with different lifespans. Annualize each option and pick the lower. It splits into the annual operating cost plus the capital recovery cost. Updates as you type.

view.em.hint.intro: The escrow holder's acknowledgment of the buyer's good-faith deposit on a real-estate purchase. It records the deposit, computes it as a percent of the purchase price and the balance due at closing, and states the escrow/refund terms. Drafting aid, not legal advice.

view.eoq.h1.title: // ECONOMIC ORDER QUANTITY
view.eoq.hint.intro: How much to order at a time, and when to reorder, to minimize total inventory cost. Big batches cut ordering cost but raise holding cost; EOQ = โ(2ยทDยทS/H) is the batch size where the two balance (and are equal). The reorder point โ daily demand ร lead time + safety stock โ is the on-hand level that triggers the next order so it arrives before you run out. Updates as you type.
view.eoq.warn.infeasible: EOQ needs a positive holding cost and demand. The reorder point still applies.
view.eqr.h1.title: // EQUIPMENT RENTAL
view.eqr.hint.intro: Rents personal property โ tools, vehicles, AV gear, machinery โ for a fixed period. It computes the rental total from the rate and duration, adds the security deposit for the total due, and computes the return date from the rate period. Drafting aid, not legal advice.

view.er.h1.title: // EXPENSE REIMBURSEMENT
view.er.hint.intro: An employee's itemized claim for reimbursement of business expenses plus mileage. It sums the itemized expenses, computes the mileage reimbursement (business miles ร the mileage rate), and totals the two, then assembles the request with an approval line. Drafting aid, not legal/tax advice.
view.erd.h1.title: // EXPENSE RATIO DRAG
view.erd.hint.intro: A fund's expense ratio looks tiny, but it's charged on assets every year and the fee dollars never compound โ so over decades the gap versus a zero-fee fund is far larger than the headline percentage. This grows the same contributions at the gross return vs the net return (gross โ expense ratio) and shows the dollars lost to fees. Updates as you type.

Diskonttaus: alennus ร FMV-at-ostos = tavallinen, levรค = ST/LT pidoittain. $25k / vuosi tyรถntekijรคn cap (tarjoushinta). 15% alennus + takaisin = taattu ~17,6%+ tuotto ostoksen yhteydessรค.

view.estate.hint.intro: Gross estate less debts, the unlimited marital deduction, and charitable bequests gives the taxable estate; lifetime gifts are added back, and the amount above the exclusion is taxed at the top rate. 2026 defaults: $15M per person ($30M for a couple via portability), 40% rate. Updates as you type.

view.estimate.h1.title: // ESTIMATE / QUOTE GENERATOR
view.estimate.hint.intro: A non-binding price quote to send before work is authorized. It uses the same line-item math as the invoice โ each line's amount, the subtotal, an optional discount, tax on the discounted subtotal, and the total, all rounded to cents โ plus a valid-until date from your validity window. Copy or download the finished quote.

view.eva.h1.title: // ECONOMIC VALUE ADDED
view.eva.hint.intro: EVA is the after-tax operating profit a business earns above the cost of the capital it employs: NOPAT (EBIT after tax) minus invested capital times WACC. Positive EVA creates value; negative destroys it even when accounting profit is positive. Equivalently, (ROIC โ WACC) ร invested capital. Updates as you type.
view.evebitda.h1.title: // EV / EBITDA
view.evebitda.hint.intro: Enterprise value is what it costs to buy the whole business โ equity plus the debt you assume, less the cash you get. EV/EBITDA is the capital-structure-neutral valuation multiple: unlike P/E it ignores how the firm is financed. Add revenue for EV/Sales and the EBITDA margin. All figures in the same units (millions or dollars). Updates as you type.
view.ew.h1.title: // EMPLOYEE WRITE-UP
view.ew.hint.intro: Documents a workplace incident and the corrective action. The disciplinary level (verbal โ written โ final โ termination) drives the consequence and the next-step escalation language. Drafting aid, not legal/HR advice.

view.fact.h1.title: // INVOICE FACTORING
view.fact.hint.intro: A factor advances most of an unpaid invoice now, charges a fee, and releases the rest (the reserve, net of the fee) when the customer pays. A flat 3% fee looks cheap, but it buys cash for only the short collection period โ annualized, it's an expensive loan. The effective APR = (fee รท advance) ร (365 รท term days). Updates as you type.
view.fafsa_efc.intro: Simplified Student Aid Index (SAI, the successor to EFC under the FAFSA Simplification Act, effective 2024-25). SAI = parent income contribution (graduated 22-47% on available income) + parent asset contribution (5.64%) + student income contribution (50% above $9,410 allowance) + student asset contribution (20%). Big change vs old EFC: SAI does NOT divide by number in college. This is a simplified estimate, not an official calculation.

Oletus kรคyttรครค 3,5:tรค prosenttia terรคsvaijeria (varovampi kuin kanoninen 4%) marginaalin ulkopuolisiin tarpeisiin. Tasot: ei rasvaa < $80k, rajaviiva < $100k, rasvaa < $250k, lihava โฅ $250k.

view.flip.h1.title: // FIX & FLIP UNDERWRITING
view.flip.hint.intro: Two questions every flipper asks. What's the most I can pay? The 70% rule: max allowable offer = ARV ร 70% โ rehab; the 30% haircut covers holding, financing, selling, and profit. What do I make? Net profit = sale proceeds (ARV less selling costs) minus every cost โ purchase, rehab, closing, the monthly carry, and the financing (points + interest). Cash-on-cash divides profit by the cash you put in (all-in cost less the loan) and annualizes by the hold. Updates as you type.

view.glide_path.intro: Generic Target-Date Fund (TDF) glide path. Two-segment linear ramp: working phase (current โ retirement) from start_stock_pct down to retire_stock_pct, then to-landing (retirement โ landing_age) from retire down to landing_stock_pct, then post-landing flat. Defaults approximate Vanguard's Target Retirement glide (90 โ 50 โ 30 across ages 25 / 65 / 72).

view.gmroi.h1.title: // GMROI
view.gmroi.hint.intro: Gross Margin Return On Inventory Investment โ how many gross-margin dollars each dollar tied up in inventory returns. Above 1.0 means each inventory dollar earns more than a dollar of margin; general-merchandise retail often targets ~3.2. Updates as you type.

Herkkyystaulukko nรคyttรครค, kuinka vaadittu kuukausittain vaihtelee, jos oletettu paluu tai horisontti siirtyy.

view.graham.h1.title: // GRAHAM NUMBER
view.graham.hint.intro: Benjamin Graham's value screen for a defensive investor. The Graham number โ sqrt(22.5 x EPS x book value per share) โ is the most you should pay; the margin of safety is how far the price sits below it. The P/E x P/B product should stay within 22.5. The net-net fields screen for deep value at two-thirds of net current asset value. Updates as you type.

Riski: Myรถntรคjรคn on SERVIVE aika-aika tai varat takaisin.

view.grm.h1.title: // GROSS RENT MULTIPLIER
view.grm.hint.intro: A fast way to compare rental prices: property price รท gross annual rent. A lower GRM is cheaper relative to the rent it produces. Scheduled rent overstates reality, so vacancy and credit loss are netted out (and other income added) into effective gross income โ and an effective GRM on what's actually collected. Updates as you type.
view.grossup.h1.title: // BONUS GROSS-UP
view.grossup.hint.intro: The gross payment needed so the recipient nets a target after tax - for grossing up a bonus, relocation, or make-whole payment. The federal supplemental-wage flat rate is 22% (37% above $1M); state and the 7.65% FICA stack on top. Updates as you type.
view.guar.h1.title: // LEASE GUARANTY / CO-SIGNER
view.guar.hint.intro: A guarantor (often a parent or principal) unconditionally guarantees a tenant's obligations under a lease. It computes the total rent over the term as a measure of the guaranteed exposure and assembles the guaranty clauses. Drafting aid, not legal advice.
view.guardrails.h1.title: // GUYTON-KLINGER GUARDRAILS
view.guardrails.hint.intro: Dynamic retirement withdrawals. A static 4% rule ignores how the portfolio actually does; guardrails adjust each year's draw so a bad sequence doesn't drain the account and a good one isn't under-spent. Raise with inflation โ but freeze the raise in a down year; cut 10% if the withdrawal rate climbs past the upper guardrail; raise 10% if it falls below the lower one.
view.guardrails.tip.gained: Drives the freeze rule โ no inflation raise after a down year

view.househack.h1.title: // HOUSE HACKING
view.househack.hint.intro: Buy a 2โ4 unit property, live in one unit, rent the rest. The tenants' rent offsets your carrying cost (mortgage + tax + insurance + maintenance + HOA), so the money that would have been rent builds equity instead. This shows what you actually pay to live there, how it compares to renting, and the property's cash flow once you move out and rent every unit.
view.househack.note.covers: One unit's rent already covers the mortgage P&I.
view.househack.note.partial: The rented units cover part of the carrying cost โ the rest is your housing budget.
view.hpr.h1.title: // HOLDING-PERIOD RETURN
view.hpr.hint.intro: Total return on a position, split into the price change and the income (dividends, interest, coupons) collected while held, then annualized over the days held. A 25% gain over two years annualizes to ~11.8%; the same gain over six months annualizes to ~56%. Updates as you type.

view.hsatt.h1.title: // HSA TRIPLE-TAX ADVANTAGE
view.hsatt.hint.intro: The HSA is the only account taxed favorably three ways: contributions are deductible, growth is tax-free, and withdrawals for medical expenses are tax-free. This projects an HSA against a taxable account funded with the same gross income โ the taxable side invests only the after-tax amount and pays cap-gains on its growth. The gap is the dollar value of the triple-tax treatment. Updates as you type.

view.ica.h1.title: // CONTRACTOR AGREEMENT (1099)
view.ica.hint.intro: Engages a contractor for services as a non-employee. State the fee as fixed or hourly (it projects an estimated total from your hours) with net-N payment terms; it assembles the operative clauses โ services, compensation, term, independent-contractor status (own taxes, 1099, no benefits), confidentiality, work-product assignment, termination, and governing law. view.ick.h1.title: // INSPECTION CHECKLIST
view.ick.hint.intro: The area-by-area condition record a landlord and tenant complete at move-in and move-out. It records each area's condition and notes and counts the items flagged as needing attention (fair / poor / damaged). Pairing the move-in and move-out records is what justifies any deposit deduction. Drafting aid, not legal advice.

view.insider_clusters.intro: Riding on the live insider_stream Form-4 firehose, this view groups buys per symbol over the trailing 30 days and ranks by a composite of distinct-insider-count + role-mix (officers weighted 3ร, directors 1.5ร, 10%-owners 1ร) + recency-weighted $ value (7-day half-life). Cohen, Malloy & Pomorski 2012 documented that opportunistic clusters of โฅ3 insiders predict ~12% alpha over the next 12 months โ one of the largest single-signal edges available from free data. Sells are excluded from this ranking; the existing Insider Form 4 view shows them separately.

view.insider_stream.intro: Subscribes to the SEC EDGAR catalyst stream, filters to Form 4 filings, fetches each one's XML, and extracts insider name, title (officer/director/10%-owner), transaction code, shares, and price-per-share. Cluster insider buys are the academically-best free signal โ Lakonishok & Lee 2001 found ~5-10% annual outperformance over the next 6-12 months. TTS fires on every officer Buy โฅ $1M.

view.irmaa.h1.title: // MEDICARE IRMAA SURCHARGE
view.irmaa.hint.intro: High-income Medicare beneficiaries pay a surcharge on top of the standard Part B and Part D premiums. It's a cliff: cross a MAGI threshold by a single dollar and you owe the full higher tier all year โ no phase-in. IRMAA is assessed per enrolled person on a two-year lookback, so 2026 premiums are set on your 2024 MAGI. That's why Roth conversions, capital gains, and RMDs taken two years before you enroll quietly raise these premiums.
view.irmaa.note: 2026 premiums (based on 2024 MAGI). Standard Part B is $202.90/mo. IRMAA is charged per enrolled individual; brackets are inflation-adjusted yearly.
view.irmaa.tip.both: MFJ only โ when both spouses are enrolled, each pays the surcharge, doubling the household total

view.itemize.h1.title: // STANDARD VS ITEMIZED
view.itemize.hint.intro: Itemized deductions are SALT (state/local + property tax, capped) plus mortgage interest, charitable gifts, and medical costs above 7.5% of AGI. You take whichever is larger โ the standard deduction or the itemized total. 2026 defaults: $16,100 single / $32,200 MFJ standard, $40,400 SALT cap (phasing down above $505k AGI). Updates as you type.

view.la.h1.title: // ASSIGNMENT OF LEASE
view.la.hint.intro: The original tenant (assignor) transfers the entire remaining interest in a lease to a new tenant (assignee), who steps into the assignor's shoes for the rest of the term. Distinct from a sublease. It computes the whole months remaining and the rent obligation transferred, and handles whether the assignor is released or remains secondarily liable. Drafting aid, not legal advice.

view.lc.h1.title: // LAND CONTRACT (CONTRACT FOR DEED)
view.lc.hint.intro: An owner-financed installment sale where the seller keeps legal title until the buyer pays in full. It computes the monthly payment on the seller-financed balance, the total of payments, and the total interest, plus the maturity date. Distinct from the purchase agreement and the promissory note. Drafting aid, not legal advice.

view.lead.h1.title: // LEAD-BASED PAINT DISCLOSURE
view.lead.hint.intro: The disclosure a landlord of pre-1978 "target housing" must give before a lease under federal law (42 U.S.C. ยง 4852d). It determines from the year built whether the disclosure is required, then assembles the lessor disclosure, the lead-pamphlet acknowledgment, and the certifications. Drafting aid, not legal advice.
view.lean_fire.intro: Lean FIRE = FIRE minimalistisilla menoilla Pienempi portfolio tavoite, nopeampi aikajana, vรคhemmรคn marginaalia, jos kulut yllรคttรครค. Tasot: ultralean โค $25k, lean โค $40k, rajaviiva โค $55k, muuten ei laiha.

view.lease.h1.title: // RESIDENTIAL LEASE GENERATOR
view.lease.hint.intro: Assemble a standard residential lease from your terms. It computes the lease length, prorates the first month when the tenant moves in mid-month, and totals the cash due at move-in (first month + deposits + optional last month), then renders a printable agreement you can copy or download. Drafting aid, not legal advice โ deposit caps and required disclosures vary by state.

view.lease_vs_buy_car.intro: Vertailee vuokrasopimusta vs. osta N-vuosianalyysihorisontin aikana, jossa keskitytรครคn ainoastaan sopimuseroihin (polttoaine/vakuutus/rekisterรถinti ovat samat sekรค poluilla ettรค peruutuksilla). LEASE = kuukausittaiset maksut ร horisontti + toistuvat drive-off + kรคsittelymaksut โ mahdollisuus palauttaa kรคteistรค olisit muuten laskenut. BUY = poistot + rahoituskorot horisontissa + mahdollisuuskustannukset kรคsirahasta. Breakeven kuukausittain = vuokramaksu, joka vastaa kahta polkua.

view.leverage.h1.title: // DEGREE OF LEVERAGE
view.leverage.hint.intro: How a change in sales is amplified down the income statement. Fixed operating costs amplify it into EBIT (operating leverage); fixed interest amplifies it again into EPS (financial leverage). A DCL of 3 means a 1% change in sales swings EPS 3%. Updates as you type.
view.lifeins.h1.title: // LIFE INSURANCE NEEDS
view.lifeins.hint.intro: How much coverage replaces lost income and clears the family's obligations - the DIME method (Debt, Income, Mortgage, Education) plus final expenses, net of existing coverage and liquid savings. The gap is what you'd need to buy. Updates as you type.

view.lihtc.hint.intro: Liittovaltion luotto kohtuuhintaisille asuntosijoittajille. 10 vuoden luottovirta. 9 prosentin luotto: uusi rakentaminen / huomattava kuntoutus (kilpailukykyinen valtion jako). 4% luotto: yritysosto / joukkovelkakirjarahoitettu (ei-kilpailukykyinen). Jollei passiivista toimintaa koskevista sรครคnnรถistรค muuta johdu, ERU. Syndikaattoreiden myymรค yritys-/passiivinen sijoittaja 80-95 โฌ dollari.

view.lke.h1.title: // ยง 1031 LIKE-KIND EXCHANGE
view.lke.hint.intro: Swapping one investment property for another defers the gain โ but only to the extent you fully reinvest. Boot (non-like-kind value you keep) is taxable now: cash received plus net debt relief (old mortgage โ new mortgage, if you trade down). Recognized gain = the lesser of realized gain or total boot; the rest defers into the replacement property's carryover basis (its cost โ deferred gain). A loss isn't recognized. Updates as you type.
view.lke.note.full: Fully deferred โ no boot, no tax due now; the entire gain rolls into the replacement basis.
view.llc.col.name: Member
view.llc.h1.title: // LLC OPERATING AGREEMENT
view.llc.hint.intro: Governs a limited liability company among its members. Each member's capital contribution determines their ownership percentage (capital / total capital), which drives profit/loss allocation and distributions. It computes the splits and assembles the operative clauses. Drafting aid, not legal advice.
view.llc.label.name: LLC name
view.llc.ph.name: Member name
view.llc.th.name: Member
view.lmf.h1.title: // CAR LEASE PAYMENT
view.lmf.hint.intro: A lease payment is depreciation + finance fee + tax. Depreciation = (cap cost โ residual) รท term โ paying for the value lost while you drive. The finance fee = (cap cost + residual) ร money factor โ the interest; the money factor is a disguised rate (APR = money factor ร 2400). Tax is on the payment in most states. Updates as you type.
view.lo.h1.title: // LEASE-OPTION (RENT-TO-OWN)
view.lo.hint.intro: A tenant leases with an option to buy at an agreed price, with the up-front option fee and a portion of each rent payment credited toward the purchase. It computes the accumulated rent credits over the option period, the total credits, the net price at exercise, and the option expiration date. Drafting aid, not legal advice.
view.loanapr.h1.title: // LOAN APR
view.loanapr.hint.intro: The true APR once upfront fees are folded in - the figure lenders must disclose, and why APR sits above the note rate. The payment is set by the note rate on the full loan, but you only receive the loan less fees, so the effective rate is higher. Updates as you type.
view.lobbying.h1.title: // LOBBYINGIN ILMOITUKSET
view.lobbying.hint.intro: Per-symbolin senaatin lobbaus lobbaus tietojen julkistamiseen (LD-1, LD-2). Pinnat issues yritys lobbaa + dollari kuluttaa ... hyรถdyllistรค katalyytin ennakointi noin sรครคntely tapahtumia.
view.lobbying.th.date: Pรคivรคmรครคrรค
view.log_viewer.web_unsupported: Lokikatselin on saatavilla vain tyรถpรถydรคn sovellus ... web building ei ole paikallista lokitiedostoa.
view.longev.h1.title: // PORTFOLIO LONGEVITY
view.longev.hint.intro: How long a nest egg lasts under inflation-adjusted withdrawals. Each year the balance grows at the return, then the (inflation-grown) withdrawal comes out. If it survives the horizon, the draw is sustainable. Updates as you type.
view.lrnw.h1.title: // LEASE RENEWAL / EXTENSION
view.lrnw.hint.intro: Extends an existing tenancy for a new fixed term, optionally at an adjusted rent. It computes the new lease end date (renewal start + term, ending the day before the next period) and the rent change versus the expiring rent, then assembles the renewal agreement. Drafting aid, not legal advice.
view.lrnw.ph.statute: e.g. Ohio Rev. Code ยง 5321
view.ltcg_harvesting.intro: Realize long-term gains up to the top of the 0% LTCG bracket, then immediately repurchase to step up cost basis tax-free. No wash-sale rule on gains. 2025 ceilings (top of 0% bracket): single $48,350 ยท MFJ $96,700 ยท HoH $64,750 โ measured on taxable income (ordinary + LTCG), so room = ceiling minus ordinary taxable income. Most useful in low-income years (sabbatical, early retirement, layoff, first year of FIRE).
view.ltcg_harvesting.title: LTCG HARVEST ING ยท 0% BRACKET FILL
view.lter.h1.title: // LEASE TERMINATION LETTER
view.lter.hint.intro: The written notice either party gives to end a tenancy. Pick who is sending it โ the wording adapts for a landlord or a tenant. It computes the termination/move-out date from the service date plus the notice period. Drafting aid, not legal advice.
view.ltvcac.h1.title: // LTV : CAC
view.ltvcac.hint.intro: Does acquiring customers pay off? LTV (lifetime value) = monthly gross profit per customer ร average lifetime (100 รท monthly churn %) โ gross profit, since you keep only the margin. CAC is the sales + marketing cost per new customer. The LTV:CAC ratio rule of thumb is 3:1; below ~1:1 you lose money on each customer, far above 3:1 you may be under-investing in growth. CAC payback is the months of gross profit to recoup the cost. Updates as you type.
view.lump_sum_vs_dca.intro: Vanguard 2012 paperi: kertasumma voittaa DCA ~67% US 60/40 -salkun keskiloppuarvo ~2,4% korkeampi 10-vuotisen horisontin aikana, koska markkina-aika yleensรค voittaa odottamisen ja DCA jรคttรครค pรครคomaa ansaitsemaan vรคhemmรคn rahaa. DCA voittaa edelleen emotionaalisesti (alempi valitettavasti varianssi) ja tilastollisesti alas tai sivuttain markkinoilla. Sรครคdรค odotettu tuotto alle 0%/V nรคhdรคksesi DCA:n tauon.

view.margin.h1.title: // MARGIN ANALYSIS
view.margin.hint.intro: The income-statement waterfall: revenue down to net income, with the margin (percent of revenue) at each level. Gross strips out COGS, operating subtracts overhead, pre-tax removes interest, and net is after tax. Updates as you type.

view.mirr.h1.title: // MODIFIED IRR (MIRR)
view.mirr.hint.intro: Plain IRR assumes interim cash flows are reinvested at the IRR itself โ usually unrealistic. MIRR discounts the outflows at a finance rate and compounds the inflows forward at a reinvestment rate, giving one unambiguous return. Enter the period cash flows (index 0 is today, usually the negative outlay). Updates as you type.

view.mm.h1.title: // MARKUP vs MARGIN
view.mm.hint.intro: Markup is profit as a percent of cost; margin is the same profit as a percent of price. They are never equal โ a 50% markup is only a 33% margin, and doubling cost (100% markup, "keystone") is a 50% margin. Pricing off the wrong one erodes profit. Pick what you know โ price, markup%, or margin% โ and see all four. Updates as you type.
view.mm.warn.infeasible: A margin of 100% or more is impossible โ price would be infinite. Lower the margin.

view.mpbe.col.name: Product
view.mpbe.h1.title: // MULTI-PRODUCT BREAK-EVEN
view.mpbe.hint.intro: When a business sells several products in a fixed mix, the break-even point depends on the blended margin. Each product contributes price minus variable cost per unit; weighting those by the unit sales mix gives the weighted-average contribution margin, and fixed costs over that is the total break-even volume. Updates as you type.
view.mpbe.infeasible: No break-even โ the blended contribution margin is not positive.
view.mpbe.ph.name: Name
view.mpbe.th.name: Product
view.mpt.h1.title: // MORTGAGE POINTS BREAK-EVEN
view.mpt.hint.intro: Paying discount points up front (1 point = 1% of the loan) lowers the rate, and so the monthly payment. Whether it pays off comes down to how long you keep the loan: the break-even is the months for the payment savings to recoup the points cost. Keep the loan past it and the points win; sell or refinance before it and you lose. Updates as you type.

view.nda.h1.title: // NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
view.nda.hint.intro: Protects confidential information shared between parties โ one-way (one discloser) or mutual (both disclose). Drafting aid, not legal advice.

view.niit_calculator.intro: Affordable Care Act's 3.8% Net Investment Income Tax. Applies to lesser of (a) net investment income, or (b) MAGI over the threshold. Thresholds have NOT been indexed since 2013 โ $200k single / $250k MFJ / $125k MFS โ increasingly affecting middle earners as nominal income drifts upward.

view.noe.h1.title: // NOTICE OF ENTRY
view.noe.hint.intro: The advance notice a landlord must give before entering a tenant's unit โ most states require 24โ48 hours for non-emergency entry. It computes the earliest lawful entry date from the service date plus the notice period and assembles the notice with the purpose and time window. Drafting aid, not legal advice.

view.noi.h1.title: // RENTAL NOI
view.noi.hint.intro: Net operating income from the rental income statement - rent plus other income, less vacancy and operating expenses (management is a percent of effective gross income). NOI excludes debt service and capital improvements, and it feeds cap rate, DSCR, and debt yield. Updates as you type.
view.nol.h1.title: // NOL TRACKER
view.nol.hint.intro: IRC:n 172 ยง TCJAn jรคlkeen: NOL:t jatkavat loputtomiin, ei peruutuksia. Joka vuosi voit kรคyttรครค NOL:iรค kompensoimaan jopa 80% verotettavasta tulosta. Jรคljitรค vuosisukupolvi + kรคyttรถ nรคhdรค jรคljellรค siirto.
view.nol.note: Huom: TCJA 80% veronalainen tulokatto tarkoittaa, ettรค edes suuri NOL ei pysty tรคysin korvaamaan kannattavaa vuotta. Suunnitelman mukainen kaupan ajoitus olisi nรคin ollen 475 ยง:n f momentin mukainen markkina-arvoin varustettu vaali, joka muuttaisi tรคmรคn kaupankรคyntitappion tavalliseksi, mikรค aiheuttaisi QBI:n kannalta hyvรคksyttรคviรค NOL:iรค.

view.notice.h1.title: // LANDLORD NOTICE GENERATOR
view.notice.hint.intro: Generates the pre-eviction notices a Michigan landlord serves โ the DC 100a Demand for Possession (nonpayment of rent, 7-day) and the DC 100c Notice to Quit to recover possession (one rental period; 30 days for a month-to-month). It fills in the SCAO form language and statutory citations and computes the comply-by date from the service date. Drafting aid, not legal advice โ it does not replace filing the official court form.

view.npvirr.h1.title: // NPV / IRR
view.npvirr.hint.intro: Discounted-cash-flow analysis for a project or investment. Enter the cash flows period by period - the first is today (usually a negative outlay), then one per period. The NPV uses your discount rate; the IRR is the rate that zeroes NPV. Also shows the profitability index and simple/discounted payback. Updates as you type.

view.paycheck401k.h1.title: // 401(k) PER-PAYCHECK MAXIMIZER
view.paycheck401k.hint.intro: How much per paycheck to hit the annual 401(k) limit by December โ and whether you're about to leave free money on the table. Most plans match per paycheck, so front-loading hits the limit early and stops your contributions (and the match) for the rest of the year, unless the plan trues up the missed match. Spreading evenly captures the full match every period.

view.pet.h1.title: // PET ADDENDUM
view.pet.hint.intro: Amends an existing lease to permit a pet on stated terms. It totals the up-front charges (refundable deposit + non-refundable fee) and adds any monthly pet rent to the base rent for a new monthly total, then assembles the addendum clauses. Drafting aid, not legal advice.
view.pet.ph.statute: e.g. Tex. Prop. Code ยง 92
view.pf.h1.title: // PROFIT FIRST ALLOCATION
view.pf.hint.intro: Take profit off the top: Sales โ Profit = Expenses, not the other way around. Real revenue (revenue minus materials and subcontractors) is split across four accounts โ Profit, Owner's Pay, Tax, Operating Expenses โ by the target allocation band for your revenue size (under $250K starts at 5/50/15/30; the profit share rises and owner's pay falls as you grow). Leave the custom fields at 0 to auto-select the band, or enter four that sum to 100. The business-side savings waterfall.
view.pfic.de_minimis.body: Jos PFIC-kokonaisarvo < $25,000 ($50k MFJ) vuoden lopussa JA ei ylijakoja: vuosilomake 8621 EI vaadita. PITรร kuitenkin seurata + raportoida myyntivoitto. Alle kynnyksen PFIC-kannat, joihin sovelletaan edelleen 1291 ยง:n mukaista kรคsittelyรค koskevaa jรคrjestelmรครค.
view.pfic.h1.title: // ยง 1296 PFIC MTM VAALI (FORM 8621)
view.pfic.hint.intro: PFIC = ulkomainen yhteisรถ, jossa โฅ 75% tuloista passiiviset TAI โฅ 50% varat tuottavat passiivisia. Oletus ยง 1291 jรคrjestelmรค: ylimenevรคt jakaumat (> 125% ennen 3 vuotta avg) tavalliset tulot + korkokulut (lasketaan vuoteen 1). ยง 1296 ยง 1295 QEF: vuositulot, sรคilyttรครค ylรคrajan korotuksen luonteen. Lomake 8621 vuosittain. Yhteinen ansa: ulkomaiset sijoitusrahastot, elรคkerahastot (esimerkiksi eurooppalaiset yhteissijoitusyritykset).

view.pia.h1.title: // SOCIAL SECURITY PIA
view.pia.hint.intro: Your full-retirement-age benefit comes from Average Indexed Monthly Earnings (AIME) through a progressive three-tier formula: 90% of AIME up to the first bend point, 32% between the two bend points, and 15% above the second. The 90/32/15 rates are fixed by law; the bend points (2026: $1,286 and $7,749) are indexed yearly and lock in at age 62. Lower earners get a higher replacement rate. Updates as you type.
view.piotroski.h1.title: // PIOTROSKI F-SCORE
view.piotroski.hint.intro: Joseph Piotroski's 9-point test of financial strength โ one point for each criterion passed across profitability, leverage/liquidity, and operating efficiency. 8-9 is strong, 0-2 is weak. Enter this year and last year for each line; operating cash flow is this year only. Updates as you type.

view.plans.hint.risk_chart: Osakekohtainen merkintรค - pysรคkki. Laajat pysรคkit tarkoittavat pienempรครค asemaa kiinteรคn riskibudjetin osalta; tiukat pysรคkit merkitsevรคt suurempaa. Kriittisiรค pรครคtรถksiรค varten.
view.pmi.h1.title: // PMI REMOVAL
view.pmi.hint.intro: When private mortgage insurance drops off a conventional loan. PMI is tied to loan-to-value against the original home value - you can request cancellation at 80% LTV, and the servicer must cancel automatically at 78% (Homeowners Protection Act). This shows the month scheduled payments reach each threshold. Updates as you type.
view.pnote.h1.title: // PROMISSORY NOTE
view.pnote.hint.intro: A borrower's written promise to repay a fixed loan โ for owner financing, intra-family loans, business notes, or seller carry-back. It amortizes the loan (level monthly payment, total interest, maturity date) and assembles the operative clauses: promise to pay, interest, repayment, prepayment, default/acceleration, and governing law. Drafting aid, not legal advice.
view.pnote.ph.statute: e.g. Tex. Fin. Code ยง 302
view.po.h1.title: // PURCHASE ORDER GENERATOR
view.po.hint.intro: The buyer-side document that authorizes a purchase from a vendor. It uses the same line-item math as the invoice โ amounts, subtotal, discount, tax โ adds optional shipping to the grand total, and computes the expected delivery date from your lead time. Copy or download the PO.

view.pref.hint.intro: A preferred share pays a fixed dividend forever, so it's valued as a perpetuity - fair value is the dividend divided by your required yield. Enter a market price to see the current yield and whether it's cheap. Updates as you type.

view.price_target.h1.title: / / HINTATAVOITE
view.price_target.hint.intro: Wall Streetin analyytikon hintatavoitteet: korkea / mediaani / alhainen + implisiittinen nousu verrattuna nykyiseen hintaan. Hรคipyminen kaupat: varasto PT-korkea vauhti kuolema = lyhyt asennus.
view.proptax.h1.title: // PROPERTY TAX
view.proptax.hint.intro: Annual property tax from the home's value, the assessment ratio, any exemptions, and the mill rate (dollars of tax per $1,000 of taxable value). The effective rate is the tax against market value. Updates as you type.
view.ps.h1.title: // PAY STUB
view.ps.hint.intro: An earnings statement for one pay period. It computes the employee FICA withholding automatically (Social Security 6.2% + Medicare 1.45% of gross) and combines it with the income-tax withholding and any other deductions to produce total deductions and net pay. Drafting aid, not payroll/tax advice (FICA ignores the wage base and Additional Medicare).
view.pslf_tracker.field.eligible: Tรคllรค hetkellรค oikeutettu tyรถnantaja
view.pslf_tracker.intro: Julkisen palvelun laina anteeksiantamatta jรคttรคminen vuonna 2007 annetulla College Cost Reduction and Access Act -lailla. Suorita 120 vaatimukset tรคyttรคvรครค kuukausimaksua (ei perรคkkรคistรค) tuloperusteisen takaisinmaksusuunnitelman mukaisesti samalla kun tukikelpoinen hallitus / 501(c)(3) voittoa tavoittelemattoman tyรถnantajan palveluksessa. Kun 120th maksu on tarkistettu, jรคljellรค oleva liittovaltion lainasaldo annetaan anteeksi verovapaasti.
view.pslf_tracker.title: // PSLF TRACKER
view.psv.h1.title: // PENSION SURVIVOR ELECTION
view.psv.hint.intro: A pension forces a choice at retirement: single-life pays the most but stops at the retiree's death, or joint-and-survivor pays less now but continues (often reduced) to the surviving spouse. The reduction is the price of survivor protection. The pension-max alternative: take the higher single-life payment and buy life insurance for the spouse โ if the payment minus the premium still beats the J&S amount, you get more income now and protect the survivor. Updates as you type.
view.pto.h1.title: // PTO ACCRUAL POLICY
view.pto.hint.intro: States how employees accrue paid time off. It computes the annual accrual (rate per pay period ร periods per year) in both hours and workdays, applies any carryover cap, and assembles the policy clauses (eligibility, accrual, carryover, usage, separation payout). Drafting aid, not legal advice.
view.ptr.h1.title: // PRICE-TO-RENT RATIO
view.ptr.hint.intro: A quick read on whether a market favors buying or renting: home price รท annual rent for a comparable home. Under 15 generally favors buying, 15โ20 is borderline, over 20 favors renting (the home is pricey relative to what it rents for). The gross rental yield is the inverse. A screen, not a full rent-vs-buy NPV. Updates as you type.

view.qlac.h1.title: // QLAC โ RMD DEFERRAL
view.qlac.hint.intro: A Qualified Longevity Annuity Contract moves a capped amount out of an IRA/401(k) into a deferred annuity that starts later (up to age 85). That money is excluded from the RMD base, lowering your required distribution (and tax) during the deferral years. The premium is capped by SECURE 2.0 at $210,000 for 2025โ2026 (lifetime, per person) and can't exceed the account balance. Updates as you type.
view.qlac.warn.over: Requested premium exceeds the limit โ capped to the maximum allowed.

view.rbf.h1.title: // ROTH BRACKET-FILL
view.rbf.hint.intro: In a low-income year, convert traditional IRA dollars to Roth up to the top of your current tax bracket โ but not a dollar more, which would spill into the next, higher bracket. This fills the cheap bracket now to avoid larger RMDs taxed higher later. Enter your taxable income, the bracket ceiling, and its rate (look up your year's brackets); the conversion is capped at your traditional balance. Updates as you type.
view.rbf.warn.over: Income already meets or exceeds the bracket ceiling โ no room to convert at this rate.
view.rcpt.h1.title: // RENT RECEIPT
view.rcpt.hint.intro: The written acknowledgment of a rent payment a landlord gives (and some states require) a tenant. It records the amount paid against the rent due, computes any remaining balance or overpayment credit, flags paid-in-full, and notes the period covered and payment method. Drafting aid, not legal advice.

view.realraise.h1.title: // REAL RAISE
view.realraise.hint.intro: Whether a pay raise actually beats inflation. A nominal raise only buys more if it outpaces inflation - a raise equal to inflation is a wash, and below it is a real pay cut. Shows the inflation-adjusted break-even salary and the real (purchasing-power) change. Updates as you type.

view.rent_vs_buy.intro: NYT-laskenta-tyylinen vuosivertailu. RENT polku = vuosivuokra โ sijoitustuotto siitรค, mikรค olisi ollut kรคsirahasi + sulkemiskustannukset. BUY polku = PITI + yllรคpito + mahdollisuuskustannukset oman pรครคoman โ asuntojen arvostus โ asuntolainojen maksullinen lasku, plus myyntikulut poistuessa. Tauko seitsemรคn vuotta = ensimmรคinen vuosi, jolloin kumulatiiviset ostokustannukset โค kumulatiiviset vuokrakustannukset.
view.rent_vs_buy.title: // RENT VS BUY
view.rentaff.h1.title: // RENT AFFORDABILITY
view.rentaff.hint.intro: The most rent you can comfortably afford. The 30% rule caps rent at 30% of gross monthly income (the same as the landlord 40x annual rule); a debt-adjusted cap keeps rent plus other debts within a back-end limit. The lower of the two is the recommended ceiling. Updates as you type.
view.rentesc.h1.title: // LEASE COST
view.rentesc.hint.intro: The true cost of a lease with annual rent bumps and free-rent concessions. Rent steps up each anniversary; the first months can be waived. The effective monthly rent spreads the total over the full term - what you compare offers on. Updates as you type.
view.rentret.h1.title: // RENTAL TOTAL RETURN
view.rentret.hint.intro: A leveraged rental builds wealth four ways in a year: cash flow (NOI less debt service), appreciation, the loan principal the rent retires, and the depreciation tax shield. Summed over the cash invested, the total return runs well above the cap rate. 27.5-year straight-line depreciation on the building. Updates as you type.

view.retire.ira.note: Vรคhennykset poistetaan asteittain AGI:n toimesta, jos ne kuuluvat tyรถnantajasuunnitelman piiriin (ml. SEP/Solo 401k). Roth IRA vaiheita ulos korkean tulotason liian takaovi Roth tarvitaan.

view.reverse_mortgage.intro: FHA-insured Home Equity Conversion Mortgage. Borrower โฅ62, home is primary residence. Lender pays YOU; balance compounds; due when you leave the home permanently. Non-recourse: heirs never owe more than the home is worth. 2025 FHA lending limit: $1,209,750. PLF below is a linear approximation โ use HUD's official table for a real quote.

view.rinc.h1.title: // RENT INCREASE NOTICE
view.rinc.hint.intro: The written notice a landlord serves before raising rent on a periodic tenancy. Enter the increase as a percent or a flat amount; it computes the new rent, the dollar and percent change, and the effective date from the service date plus the required notice period. Many states set the minimum notice (and sometimes a cap) by the size of the increase. Drafting aid, not legal advice.

view.rr.h1.title: // REAL (INFLATION-ADJUSTED) RETURN
view.rr.hint.intro: A nominal return overstates your gain โ inflation erodes purchasing power and taxes take a cut. The Fisher equation gives the exact real return: (1 + nominal) รท (1 + inflation) โ 1. The "nominal โ inflation" shortcut runs a touch high. After-tax real applies the tax to the return first. Over a horizon, the real future value is the principal's purchasing power in today's dollars. Updates as you type.

view.ruleof40.h1.title: // RULE OF 40
view.ruleof40.hint.intro: The SaaS/growth-company health check: revenue growth rate plus profit margin should sum to at least 40%. It trades growth against profitability - a company can pass by growing fast at a loss, or growing slowly with fat margins. The margin can be FCF, EBITDA, or net - whatever you pair with growth. Updates as you type.

view.rvs.h1.title: // RENT vs SELL
view.rvs.hint.intro: Keep the property as a rental or sell it and invest the proceeds? This compares total wealth at the end of your horizon, both assuming you liquidate at the end. Sell now: net proceeds (value โ selling costs โ mortgage โ capital-gains tax) compounded at your alternative return. Keep: the property appreciates and throws off rental cash flow (reinvested), then sells at the horizon. Mortgage paydown is ignored (conservative for keeping). Updates as you type.

view.s1014.hint.intro: Perijรคn peruste = FMV dededentin kuoleman yhteydessรค (tai vaihtoehtoinen arvostus 6 kuukautta myรถhemmin). Pyyhitรครคn sisรครคnrakennettu voitto, joka kertyi kuolleena. ยง 1014(c) IRD poikkeus: NO vaihe-up perinteisen IRA / 401(k) / annuity / NQ lykรคtty comp. Yhteisomistus: vain kuolleen puoli askelta ylรถspรคin. Yhteisรถn omaisuus (AZ, CA, ID, LA, NV, NM, TX, WA, WI + AK opt-in): Molemmat puolikkaat astuvat esiin. Vahvin kuolinpesรคn suunnittelusรครคntรถ.

view.scanner_backtest.empty.no_data: Ei signaaleja pisteytetรครคn Yritรค lisรคtรค takautumaan ikkunan tai siemenen ansioita tietoja.
view.scanner_backtest.hint.all: Jรคrjesti 20d Sharpe laskeutuu ... horisontti Kelly oletus. Skannerit, joissa ei ole tietoja (ei historiallisia tapahtumia vรคlimuistissa tai ei hinta-palkkeja) nรคkyvรคt .

Osumanopeus โฅ 55% ja positiivinen keskiarvo on yhdenmukainen. Max-DD nรคyttรครค pahin huippu-to-trough . Pidรค se rajoittaa vs riskibudjetti.

view.scanner_backtest.hint.walk_interpre: Jos testi Sharpe on paljon pienempi kuin juna Sharpe, nรคytenumero sopi historiaan, joka ei toista. Vaihda OOS-numeroa, ei IS-numeroa.
view.scanner_backtest.intro: Kunkin skannerin, vie jokaisen historiallisen signaalin se olisi tuottanut yli training ikkunan, etsii eteenpรคin 1d / 5d / 20d / 60d palautuu vรคlimuistissa hinta-palkkeja, ja aggregaatit osumanopeus, keskiarvo / mediaani tuotto, vuositasolla Sharpe, ja max nosto. PEAD on ensimmรคinen skanneri, joka on testattu olemassa olevasta earnings events -taulukosta. Lakkaa arvaamasta, millรค skannereilla on etulyรถntiasema; vaihda niistรค mitattavia Sharpe > 1.

view.scorp.card.net_savings: Vuosittaiset nettosรครคstรถt (S-corp - sole-prop)
view.scorp.caveats.body: Kohtuullinen comp pannaan tรคytรคntรถรถn .Vero-oikeus luokittelee matalapalkkat uudelleen. S-Corp lisรครค lomakkeen 1120-S, K-1 liikkeeseenlasku, neljรคnnesvuosittaiset palkkasummat, valtion franchising verot (CA $800/v, NY/IL maksut). Alle ~80k dollaria nettotulot, kustannukset yleensรค ylittรครค sรครคstรถt. Yli $ 400k+ tulot, FICA cap vรคhentรครค marginaalista hyรถtyรค. Monet kauppiaat kรคyttรคvรคt SINGLE-OWNER S-corp erityisesti QBI + SE sรครคstรถt.
view.scorp.h1.title: // S-CORP VAALIKALCULATOR
view.scorp.hint.intro: S-corp vaalit sรครคstรครค SE veroa osa EI maksettu W-2 palkat. Kohtuullinen comp sรครคntรถ: IRS odottaa ~40-60% voittoa W-2 palveluyrityksille. Alle ~80 dollaria nettotulot, S-corp ylรคpuolella yleensรค ylittรครค sรครคstรถt.

view.sd.h1.title: // SELLER'S PROPERTY DISCLOSURE
view.sd.hint.intro: The statement of known material defects a seller of real property gives the buyer before sale (required in most states). For each item the seller marks no known issue, a known defect, or unknown, with an explanation; the form counts the disclosed defects and unknowns. Drafting aid, not legal advice.
view.sde.h1.title: // SDE BUSINESS VALUATION
view.sde.hint.intro: What an owner-operated business is worth. Buyers value Seller's Discretionary Earnings - net income with the owner's compensation and discretionary items added back - times an industry multiple (typically ~2-4x). The small-business analog of EV/EBITDA. Updates as you type.
view.sdi.h1.title: // SECURITY DEPOSIT ITEMIZATION
view.sdi.hint.intro: The itemized statement a landlord must send a departing tenant: the deposit held, each deduction with its amount, and the balance returned (or still owed). Most states require this in writing within a set number of days of move-out โ miss it and you can forfeit the right to withhold anything. It computes the totals and the statutory deadline date. Drafting aid, not legal advice.
view.sdi.ph.statute: e.g. Cal. Civ. Code ยง 1950.5

view.secondinc.h1.title: // SECOND INCOME
view.secondinc.hint.intro: What a household actually keeps from a second earner's income. It's taxed at the household's marginal rate (it stacks on top of the first), then childcare and work-related costs come out - what's left is the real benefit of working. Updates as you type.

view.sev.h1.title: // SEVERANCE AGREEMENT
view.sev.hint.intro: Separates an employee with a severance payment in exchange for a release of claims. It computes severance pay from the weeks offered and the weekly salary, adds any accrued-PTO payout for the total, and assembles the release clauses โ including the ADEA consideration and revocation windows when the employee is 40 or older. Drafting aid, not legal advice.
view.sev.label.title: Job title
view.sf.h1.title: // SELLER FINANCING
view.sf.hint.intro: When the seller is the bank: the buyer puts down a down payment and pays the seller directly on the balance (the carryback note) at a rate, amortized over a schedule โ often with a balloon where the remaining balance is due in a few years. Shows the monthly payment, the balloon balance owed at that date, and the interest the seller earns. Updates as you type.

view.sira.h1.title: // SPOUSAL IRA
view.sira.hint.intro: Normally an IRA contribution needs earned income. The spousal-IRA rule lets a married couple filing jointly fund an IRA for a spouse with little or no income, as long as their combined earned income covers both contributions. Each spouse is still capped at the annual limit ($7,500 for 2026, +$1,100 catch-up at 50+). Updates as you type.

view.solar.h1.title: // SOLAR PAYBACK
view.solar.hint.intro: When a rooftop solar system pays for itself. Net cost is the install price less the 30% federal credit and any incentives; annual savings rise with utility-rate inflation but fall as panels degrade. Shows the payback year, lifetime savings, and ROI. Updates as you type.

view.spia.h1.title: // SPIA INCOME
view.spia.hint.intro: A single-premium immediate annuity turns a lump sum into guaranteed income starting now. The monthly payment is the annuity that exhausts the premium over the payout period at the insurer's assumed rate โ the same math as a loan payment, in reverse. The payout rate is the annual income as a percent of the premium. (Period-certain approximation; a true life annuity also prices in mortality.) Updates as you type.
view.split.h1.title: // STOCK SPLIT ADJUSTER
view.split.hint.intro: A split changes your share count and per-share figures but not the total value or cost basis. Enter the ratio as new:old โ 4:1 for a 4-for-1 forward split, 1:10 for a 1-for-10 reverse split. Any leftover fractional share is usually paid out as cash in lieu. Updates as you type.

view.sstax.h1.title: // SOCIAL SECURITY TAXATION
view.sstax.hint.intro: How much of your Social Security is taxable. It is driven by "provisional income" - other income plus tax-exempt interest plus half your benefits. Below the first threshold none is taxed; between the two up to 50%; above the second up to 85%. The thresholds ($25k/$34k single, $32k/$44k joint) are fixed in law and never inflation-adjusted. Updates as you type.

Pรครคomavoittoja verotettiin eri tavoin joissakin valtioissa (WA 7% > 250k). Vahvistaa kotipaikkasรครคnnรถt ennen siirtoa (NY palauttaa entiset asukkaat aggressiivisesti).

Drafting aid, not legal advice.

view.tax_rebal.hint.intro: Rebalancing to a target can realize a large capital gain it never tells you about. Enter one row per tax lot; the planner trades toward your targets but picks sell lots to minimize the gain (HIFO) or to harvest losses, and reports the gain and estimated tax the rebalance triggers. Holdings within the no-trade band are left alone.

view.tbill.h1.title: // T-BILL YIELD
view.tbill.hint.intro: T-bills are quoted on a bank-discount basis, which understates the true return. Enter either the price per $100 or the quoted discount rate and the days to maturity to see the money-market, coupon-equivalent (Treasury investment rate), and effective annual yields. Updates as you type.
view.te.h1.title: // TRADE EXPECTANCY
view.te.hint.intro: Whether a system makes money long-run isn't the win rate alone โ it's the win rate weighted by how much you win vs lose: expectancy = (win% ร avg win) โ (loss% ร avg loss). The break-even win rate is what you'd need at this reward:risk to net zero; a high win rate with a poor reward:risk can still lose. Expectancy in R is the per-trade edge in risk units. Updates as you type.
view.tey.h1.title: // TAX-EQUIVALENT YIELD
view.tey.hint.intro: Compares a tax-free municipal bond to a taxable bond after tax. Muni interest is free of federal tax (and the 3.8% NIIT), and state tax too when issued in your state. The tax-equivalent yield is what a taxable bond would have to yield to match the muni after tax. Updates as you type.

view.tips_bond.intro: Valtiokonttorin inflaatiosuojatut arvopaperit (TIPS). Pรครคoman muutokset CPI-U puolivuosittain; kiinteรค REAL korko maksetaan mukautettu pรครคoma. Maturiteetilla maksetaan takaisin enemmรคn (korjattu pรครคoma, alkuperรคinen nimellisarvo) (deflaatiotaso par). Raportointijaksoittainen pรครคoman kertyminen + kuponkikorko, kokonaisnimellisarvo vs reaalituotto.

view.tips_breakeven.intro: Markkinasidonnainen inflaatio-odotus, johdettu <koodi>nimellistuotto - TIPS reaalituotto </koodi> samalla maturiteetilla. Jos ymmรคrsit CPI kulkee <vahva >yli </vahva> breakeven, TIPS ylittรครค nimelliset. Jos <vahva > alle </vahva>, nimelliset voittavat. Long Treasury / TIPS Breakeven on puhtain markkina lukea pitkรคn aikavรคlin inflaatio-odotuksia .

view.truewage.h1.title: // TRUE HOURLY WAGE
view.truewage.hint.intro: What a job really pays once job-related costs come out of pay and job-related time - commute, prep, decompression - is added to the hours. The nominal hourly (salary / paid hours) almost always overstates it. Updates as you type.
view.ts.h1.title: // TIMESHEET
view.ts.hint.intro: Records an hourly employee's hours for a pay period and computes gross pay: regular hours at the hourly rate plus overtime hours at the rate times the overtime multiplier (1.5x by default). Drafting aid, not payroll/tax advice.

view.twoasset.h1.title: // TWO-ASSET PORTFOLIO
view.twoasset.hint.intro: Risk and return of a two-asset mix. When the assets aren't perfectly correlated, the portfolio's volatility falls below the weighted average of the two - the diversification benefit. At correlation 1 there's no benefit; at -1 the volatility is minimized. Updates as you type.

view.wacc.h1.title: // WACC
view.wacc.hint.intro: Weighted average cost of capital - the blended after-tax rate a firm pays its capital providers, and the standard discount rate for a DCF. Debt's interest is tax-deductible, so its cost is taken after tax. The cost of equity can be entered directly or derived from CAPM (risk-free + beta x equity risk premium). Updates as you type.

view.walk_forward.intro: Nรคytteiden/nรคytteiden pyyhkรคisy. Kutakin ikkunaa kohti (1) lakaise koko esiasetettu verkko IS-viipaleella, (2) valitse parhaat paraatit, (3) suorita nรคmรค paraatit OOS-viipaleella juoksevalla pรครคomalla. OOS leikkaa ommel yhdeksi jatkuvaksi pรครคomakรคyrรคksi. Kรคvelyn hyรถtysuhde = avg oos / avg is. Suhdeluvut < 0,5 osoittavat, ettรค strategia on kaareva (nรคytteessรค nรคyttรครค olevan paljon, kuolee eteenpรคin). view.waterfall.h1.title: // SAVINGS WATERFALL
view.waterfall.hint.intro: The financial order of operations: where the next dollar goes. Each month's savings flows down the ladder โ secure the employer match and a starter buffer before chasing returns, kill high-interest debt before a taxable brokerage, fill tax-advantaged space (HSA, Roth) before ordinary investing โ with whatever is left landing in a taxable account.

YTC on IRR olettaen, ettรค joukkovelkakirjaa kutsutaan ensimmรคisenรค kutsupรคivรคnรค. YTM olettaa, ettรค se on erรครคntynyt. Yield-to-worst (YTW) on alempi YTM ja mikรค tahansa YTC .
view.yield_to_call.title: YIELD CALL ยท YTC vs YTM vs YTW
view.yoc.h1.title: // YIELD ON COST
view.yoc.hint.intro: Current yield measures the dividend against today's price; yield on cost measures it against what you paid. For a dividend grower, YOC climbs every year the payout is raised โ a position bought cheaply can yield double digits on cost while its current yield looks modest. Shows YOC vs current yield and a projected YOC at your growth rate. Updates as you type.
view.yoc.toast.error: Could not compute yield on cost
view.ytf.h1.title: // YEARS TO FINANCIAL INDEPENDENCE
view.ytf.hint.intro: FI is when your portfolio funds your spending indefinitely at a safe withdrawal rate โ the FI number = annual expenses รท SWR (4% โ 25ร expenses). Starting from current savings and adding the income-minus-expenses gap each year (grown at your return), this finds the years to reach it. The dominant lever is the savings rate, far more than the return. Updates as you type.
view.zero_based_budget.intro: Dave Ramsey / YNAB sรครคntรถ: jokainen dollari kuukausitulot osoitetaan tyรถtรค ennen kuukauden alkua, joten tulot โ ฮฃ suunniteltu = 0. Raportointien kokonaismรครคrรค, ylijรครคminen (positiivinen = kohdentamaton, negatiivinen = ylimรครคrรคinen) ja luokan varianssi (todellinen - suunniteltu) sen jรคlkeen, kun olet tรคyttรคnyt todelliset tiedot kuukauden jรคlkeen.
